_comment: Vela scraper calibration — remotely updatable. The app fetches this file from the repo at launch and adopts it when 'version' is HIGHER than the version compiled into the installed build (Calibration.DEFAULT). To ship a fix without an app update: edit the drifted field(s) below, BUMP 'version', and commit to main. Endpoint hosts must stay on google.com (the app rejects anything else). Field-index paths the parsers read are still compiled in (a later phase).
_photos_comment: Full place gallery: batchexecute hspqX (/MapsPhotoService.ListEntityPhotos), a keyless POST (no 'at' token). {FID}=feature id at proto[2][0], {COUNT}=page size. Response: the ["wrb.fr","hspqX",<payload-json-string>,...] row; photos at payload[0][i][6][0]. Calibrated live 2026-06-17.
_paths_comment: Positional field-index paths the search parser reads (phase 2). Relative to a result entry whose place node is [1], except 'results'/'single'/'atThisPlace' (relative to root). 'atThisPlace' = the business(es) Google lists at a searched ADDRESS (each entry's place node at [i][0]) so the address snaps to its business. Override just the one that drifts + bump version.
_notices_comment: User-facing alerts pushed over the SIGNED channel (re-sign with scripts/sign-calibration.sh after editing). Each: id (for dismissal), level (info|warn|error), title, body, optional url. Remove the array (and bump version) to clear.

notices.title: Vela now self-updates its extractor
notices.body: Fixes for search, routing and traffic — and notices like this — can now be pushed to your phone over a signed channel, with no app update required.

_transforms_comment: Optional sandboxed JS to hot-fix a reshaped Google response without an app update (verified working on-device 2026-06-18, then cleared). Set transformsJs to a script defining parseSearch(rawResponse)->flat-places-JSON (full re-parse) and/or transformPlaces(placesJson)->flat-places-JSON (post-process); compiled Kotlin is the fallback. Re-sign after editing.
